rows.translated_text: Samsung Electronics disclosed a KRW 14.58 trillion treasury-share cancellation.
Ants net bought Samjeon Nix, lifting attention on the semiconductor bellwether stock.

Korean exporters face rising cost pressure as the won-dollar exchange rate stays near KRW 1,500. Companies with high exposure to dollar-priced raw materials and foreign-currency debt may see greater earnings volatility from the stronger exchange rate.
Redwoods disclosed a delisting trigger after an adverse audit opinion. The exchange will change the share trading-halt period and check whether the company submits a remediation plan.
